artifact_title: Note on Memory Access for Working-Set Management

claims.text: In Goal 8, the event-loop condition recovered all five required facts from the available evidence records.
In Goal 8, the event-loop condition still carried distractor material into the final artifact.
Goal 8 sharpened the finding that memory access alone is not sufficient for disciplined working-set use.

conclusion: Memory access alone does not solve working-set management for bounded autonomous work, as evidenced by Goal 8 findings that despite recovering all required facts, distractor material still contaminated the final artifact, and the specific finding that memory access is insufficient for disciplined working-set use.
recommended_action: Implement additional mechanisms to enforce working-set boundaries beyond raw memory access, such as explicit working-set declaration and contamination checks.
